label: KB Flag Target YAC
description: Targets for the flag-for-YAC modal (per DESIGN.md §3.2). USER1 is the human owner — multi-user-future-proof per Q15. AGENT_IDENTITY records seeded post-bootstrap by APP-KB-YAC follow this same value scheme.

terms.label: Peter

terms.description: KB app YAC (this app's authoring agent).
